scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the notes list stream only (GET /notes). The detailed_notes stream (per-note GET /notes/{id} fan-out from the notes list) requires a StreamHook (Tier 2) and is out of scope for this Tier-1 JSON-only wave; see docs.md's Known limits.

excluded.reason: sub-resource fan-out per note requires a StreamHook (Tier 2); out of scope for this Tier-1 JSON-only wave, tracked as a follow-up hooks increment
